channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The latest twist in the embarrassing WordPress saga involves pineapple pizza
item.description: The drama at WordPress has taken a number of twists and turns in the months since Matt Mullenweg, founder and CEO of for-profit WordPress host Automattic, shut off access to WP Engine, a third-party platform that many users deploy to host their websites.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Cisco grabs SnapAttack for threat detection
item.description: Cisco is acquiring threat-detection startup SnapAttack for an undisclosed amount as it continues to expand its security portfolio.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: John Kirby drone statement 'very misleading at best': New Jersey rep
item.description: Rep. Chris Smith (R- N.J.) slammed White House national security spokesperson John Kirby’s statement about the recent mysterious drone sightings on the East Coast. “Well, I think it's very misleading at best," Smith said in an interview on NewsNation's "The Hill" on Monday evening.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Gen Z TikTok users have taken holiday wish lists to a new level
item.description: Do you still make a holiday wish list? For those past the Santa Claus phase but still spending the holidays in their childhood bedroom, this debate divides families.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Nothing indicates 'public safety risk' from drone sightings: Kirby
item.description: National security communications adviser John Kirby reiterated Monday there is no indication the recent drone sightings pose a risk to public safety.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: The point-and-shoot is back: Panasonic launches new Lumix out of the blue, with iPhone-trouncing 30x optical zoom
item.description: The new Panasonic Lumix ZS99 / TZ99 point-and-shoot updates the ZS80 / TZ80 with USB-C charging and will go on sale in February 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How ride-hailing apps are replacing school buses
item.description: Ismael El-Amin was driving his daughter to school when a chance encounter gave him an idea for a new way to carpool. On the way across Chicago, El-Amin’s daughter spotted a classmate riding with her own dad as they drove to their selective public school on the city’s North Side.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere
item.description: DoD’s embrace of commercial technologies offers big opportunities but creates new network design and security considerations, Verizon’s Ken Gonzales explains. The post DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report accuses Amazon of manipulating worker injury data
item.description: A report by Senate Democrats released Monday accused Amazon of manipulating data on worker injuries and brushing aside workplace concerns. The report, released Sunday by Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: TikTok asks Supreme Court to delay divest-or-ban law
item.description: TikTok filed an emergency appeal at the Supreme Court on Monday seeking to delay a law that would ban the video-sharing platform nationwide if TikTok doesn’t divest from its Chinese parent company. The company’s application asks the court to put the Jan.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Making AI popular is a marathon, not a sprint
item.description: AI is everywhere, but from where I sit, there are some strong signals that suggest the road to AI Everywhere is going to be a long-distance endurance race, rather than a sprint.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This Mark Cuban-backed startup is helping creators monetize their audiences
item.description: Falon Fatemi first met Mark Cuban in 2011 at South By Southwest, where the two bonded over ideas about untapped opportunities in the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former Google CEO: A time will come to consider 'unplugging' AI system
item.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt said that the power of artificial intelligence (AI) can reach a “dangerous” point in the future and that humanity should be ready to step away from it should the time come.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: 6 sneaky scams that could ruin your holiday season
item.description: Beware of these six sneaky holiday scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives you tips to avoid falling victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to factory reset your Android
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to securely back up and factory reset your Android to protect your privacy and data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What IT hiring looks like heading into 2025
item.description: Despite low unemployment in the IT industry, IT hiring has slowed over the past two years and is expected to plateau in 2025 as employers prioritize experienced candidates with specialized skills, according to three new studies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Eyewitness accounts of New Jersey drones include politicians, journalist
item.description: Here are some of the firsthand accounts of the drone sightings, as told to NewsNation by eyewitnesses.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GSA closes in on enterprisewide software deal with Microsoft
item.description: Laura Stanton, GSA’s assistant commissioner for the IT category, said GSA, OFPP have worked with agencies to come up with 24 standard terms and conditions. The post GSA closes in on enterprisewide software deal with Microsoft first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Enterprise buyer’s guide: How to choose videoconferencing software
item.description: When most businesspeople think of videoconferencing software, the first thing that comes to mind is probably Microsoft Teams or Zoom, but there are many other choices, each with its own strengths.
item.dc:creator: us

item.title: Google’s AI coding entry with Jules signals tougher competition in coding tools
item.description: Google has made a significant entry into the competitive AI coding tools market with Jules, an experimental coding assistant aimed at enhancing developer workflows and challenging established tools like GitHub Copilot and Amazon Q Developer.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Azure hardware innovations and the serverless cloud future
item.description: Microsoft uses its events to lift the hood on Azure’s hardware and the infrastructure it uses to manage and run its services. Ignite 2024 was no different.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity response
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, the more data you have, the easier it is to identify anomalies and stop adversaries, shares Agriculture CISO Ignatius Liberto. The post Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity response first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network
